behavior.name: sub-task-tracking
behavior.summary: How sub-tasks are tracked as comments on GitHub issues. Sub-tasks are NOT separate issues — they are tracked as structured comments on the parent issue.

section.name: rules
section.rule: After plan approval, the orchestrator posts the approved sub-task list as a comment on the issue by writing to the comment queue: Append {"issue": {number}, "body": "Sub-tasks: ..."} to .github/comment-queue.json
Sub-task updates are posted as new comments on the issue, not edits to existing comments. This preserves a timeline of progress.
